title: geraniospermum laevigatum
intro: Geraniospermum laevigatum, also known as Geranium thunbergii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Geraniospermum laevigatum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Geraniospermum laevigatum include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make teas, salves, and topical creams for various health benefits.
